name: HiddenLineDrawingParameters
summary: Input used for computing a hidden line drawing

methods.name: AddClippingPlane
methods.summary: Specify clipping planes that are active for this view.

methods.name: AddGeometry(GeometryBase, Object)
methods.signature: public bool AddGeometry(GeometryBase geometry, Object tag)
methods.summary: Add geometry that should be included in the calculation

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Currently only curves, meshes, breps, surfaces, and extrusions are supported

params.name: tag
params.doc: arbitrary data to be associated with this geometry

returns.doc: true if the type of geometry can be added for calculations. Currently only curves, meshes, breps, surfaces and extrusions are supported

methods.name: AddGeometry(GeometryBase, Transform, Object)
methods.signature: public bool AddGeometry(GeometryBase geometry, Transform xform, Object tag)
methods.summary: Add geometry that should be included in the calculation

params.name: geometry
params.doc: Currently only points, point clouds, curves, meshes, breps, surfaces, and extrusions are supported

params.name: tag
params.doc: arbitrary data to be associated with this geometry

returns.doc: true if the type of geometry can be added for calculations. Currently only points, point clouds, curves, meshes, breps, surfaces and extrusions are supported

methods.name: SetViewport(RhinoViewport)
methods.summary: Set the viewport for the hidden line drawing (HLD). The viewport supplies the projection that determines the visibility of curves, and the HLD coordinate system in which the resulting curves are represented. The HLD-coordinate system is a right handed system for 3-D model space, in which the 3rd coordinate direction is the projection direction. In particular the z-coordinate direction points from the scene toward the camera.

params.name: viewport
params.doc: A copy of rhinoViewport is made inside of HiddenLineDrawing.

methods.name: SetViewport(ViewportInfo)
methods.summary: Set the viewport for the hidden line drawing (HLD). The viewport supplies the projection that determines the visibility of curves, and the HLD coordinate system in which the resulting curves are represented. The HLD-coordinate system is a right handed system for 3-D model space, in which the 3rd coordinate direction is the projection direction. In particular the z-coordinate direction points from the scene toward the camera.

params.name: viewport
params.doc: A copy of viewportInfo is made inside of HiddenLineDrawing.

properties.name: AbsoluteTolerance
properties.summary: Absolute tolerance is used to decide if curves overlap or intersect. A suggested value is to use RhinoDoc.AbsoluteTolerance

properties.name: IncludeHiddenCurves
properties.summary: Include hidden curves in hidden line drawing (default is true)

properties.name: IncludeTangentEdges
properties.summary: Include tangent edges in hidden line drawing (default is true)

properties.name: IncludeTangentSeams
properties.summary: Include tangent seams in hidden line drawing (default is true)
